facebook.caption: Upmarket seafood plates + a terrace over the ocean. For $15-30 a person. At Xin Chao on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, that's the deal. 5,010 reviews back it up. Fresh catches, big portions, buzzing crowd. This is the Phu Quoc seafood dinner you actually planned the trip for. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the plates land at Xin Chao. Grilled, steamed, stacked high. Ocean terrace, sea breeze, $15-30 a head. Phu Quoc seafood does not miss here.
